sub_modules.fixed_poly_eval_cubic: Combinational fixed-point cubic polynomial evaluator using Horner's method for p(x)=a0+a1*x+a2*x^2+a3*x^3.
sub_modules.fixed_poly_derivative_cubic: Combinational fixed-point derivative evaluator for p'(x)=a1+2*a2*x+3*a3*x^2 using Horner-style arithmetic.
sub_modules.fixed_newton_update: Combinational Newton-Raphson update block computing x_next=x-p(x)/p'(x) with fixed-point scaled division and derivative-zero protection.
sub_modules.fixed_convergence_check: Combinational absolute-value tolerance checker for polynomial residual and Newton update magnitude.
sub_modules.fixed_root_verify: Combinational verification block asserting valid when the candidate root polynomial residual is within tolerance.
sub_modules.fixed_root_pack: Combinational packer that maps the extended-precision internal fixed-point root into the configured output width.
